purpose: Machine-readable source registry for agents working with Andrey Li's method, reports, consultations, Dao scale, Wu Xing, and homeopathy materials.
rule: Agents must use this registry before free-text search when the task concerns reports, method logic, consultations, Dao levels, Wu Xing, or homeopathy.

reports_index.role: navigation index for reports, live examples, and report templates

primary_live_ru_client_report.role: primary Russian client-facing tone and structure reference

cross_repository_boundary.alchemy-method: method, consultations, live Russian report examples, Dao/Wu Xing/remedy logic
cross_repository_boundary.ai-projects-brain/andrey-system: business packaging, agent instructions, project-ready runtime instructions, templates, structural samples

search_policy.first: Open this registry and exact paths from it.
search_policy.second: Open reports-index.md when the task concerns reports.
search_policy.third: Use search only if the registry does not contain the needed source.
search_policy.never: Do not rely only on keyword search for canonical report sources.
